plan_status: adopted 25 January 2022, effective 8 March 2022 (incl. Ministerial Direction amendments; Variations No.1-3 since)
dm_standards_chapter: Development Management standards distributed by topic; consolidated Chapter 13 (Design/Density), parking in Chapter 10. Codes: DM HS, DM RH, DN, TRANS.
fetch_method: curl.exe raw PDF download (adopted Volume 1, 11.2MB) + local pdftotext extraction
notes: Laois does not use a single self-contained DM Standards chapter; standards are embedded as 'Development Management Standard' boxes per topic. Captured residential density Table 13.4 (35/30/25/15/10-12 u/ha), public OS 10%, private OS 60/75 sq m, 22m separation, parking Table 10.3, rural one-off DM RH 1: 0.202 ha (0.5 acre) + 30m road frontage, flood Justification Test. AA/EIA/AHIA enumerations are partial (in environment/heritage chapters).
